# cycloid_environment (Data Source)

Look up a single Cycloid organization-scoped environment by canonical.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cycloid_environment" "shared_prod" {
  canonical = "production"
}

output "shared_prod_clouds" {
  value = data.cycloid_environment.shared_prod.cloud_account_canonicals
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `canonical` (String) Canonical of the environment to look up.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) The organization canonical to look up the environment in. Defaults to the provider's `default_organization`.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_account_canonicals` (List of String) Canonicals of the cloud accounts linked to this environment.
- `created_at` (Number) Unix timestamp at which the environment was created.
- `description` (String) Free-form description of the environment.
- `id` (Number) Internal numeric ID assigned by the Cycloid API.
- `name` (String) Display name of the environment.
- `owner` (String) Username of the environment owner.
- `resources_count` (Number) Total count of infrastructure resources attributed to this environment.
- `type` (String) Canonical of the environment type associated with this environment.
- `updated_at` (Number) Unix timestamp at which the environment was last updated.
- `variables` (Attributes List) Environment variables attached to this environment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variables))

<a id="nestedatt--variables"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variables`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `key` (String)
- `sensitive` (Boolean)
- `type` (String)
- `value` (String, Sensitive)
